title: citrus echinata
intro: Citrus echinata, also known as the small-seeded bitter orange, is a small tree or shrub that is native to China and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of colds and flu. The health benefits of Citrus echinata include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and alleviating symptoms of gastrointestinal issues. Citrus echinata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
